top.name: Grandfather Paradox
top.rules_text: Copy the last 3 spells cast (by either player). Cast them all simultaneously targeting enemies of your choice. Each copy deals half damage.

channel.name: Grandfather Paradox (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Full damage instead of half

bottom.name: Fate Lock
bottom.rules_text: Choose an enemy. For 2 turns at start of their turn they are teleported back to their current position (they can never move from this tile).
